attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SORCTL.BATCH_ID,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15,
SORCTL.ORG_ID,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
SORCTL.REASON_CODE,
SORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
SORCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED,
SORCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED,
SORCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
SORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
SORCTL.LINE_TYPE,
SORCTL.RULE_START_DATE,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE1,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6,
SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE15,
SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
SORCTL.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG,
SORCTL.CREATED_BY,
SORCTL.DESCRIPTION,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE10,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE13,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE3,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9,
SORCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SORCTL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SORCTL.LINE_NUMBER,
SORCTL.PAYMENT_SET_ID,
SORCTL.QUANTITY_ORDERED,
SORCTL.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG,
SORCTL.TAX_PRECEDENCE,
SORCTL.TAX_RATE,
SORCTL.TAXABLE_AMOUNT,
SORCTL.UOM_CODE,
SORCTL.WAREHOUSE_ID,
SORCTL.CREATION_DATE,
SORCTL.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
SORCTL.CREATE_DATETIME,
SORCTL.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON (SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
WHERE SORCTL.LINE_TYPE ='FREIGHT' 
AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT '1' FROM  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL,  
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	WHERE SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
   WHERE SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND  SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL_1
   WHERE SATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND  SATL_1.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
	WHERE NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME ) 
)

SELECT
SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,             
SORCTL.DESCRIPTION		FREIGHT_LINE_DESCRIPTION    ,  
SORCTL.UOM_CODE			UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE     ,     
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END	RU_FREIGHT_DEBIT_AMOUNT ,      
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END		RU_FREIGHT_CREDIT_AMOUNT,      
SMATL_1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY		BK_ITEM_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,     
(CASE WHEN SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' THEN NP.ITEM_KEY WHEN SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN NP2.ITEM_KEY ELSE -998 END)  PRODUCT_KEY,
SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY			RU_AR_TRX_KEY ,                
CASE WHEN SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID  =-9999 THEN 'LINE LEVEL'  ELSE 'TRX LEVEL' END FREIGHT_LINE_TYPE,           
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN 'DEBIT' ELSE NULL END FREIGHT_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE,
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID	SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT , 
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE		SS_CODE   ,                    
SORCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE                      
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL
	ON (SMATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON (SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
	ON ( NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL_1
	ON (SMATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL_1.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = SORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID 
	       AND       SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
                                                  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    /* added for Q4FY18 CDC */
   ON (  SORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
   and   SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
       ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
       AND            SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 

	
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SMAT
	ON (SMAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
	AND SMAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
WHERE SORCTL.LINE_TYPE='FREIGHT'
UNION ALL
SELECT
SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,             
EORCTL.DESCRIPTION		FREIGHT_LINE_DESCRIPTION    ,  
EORCTL.UOM_CODE			UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE     ,     
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END	RU_FREIGHT_DEBIT_AMOUNT ,      
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END		RU_FREIGHT_CREDIT_AMOUNT,      
SMATL_1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY		BK_ITEM_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,     
(CASE WHEN EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' THEN NP.ITEM_KEY WHEN EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN NP2.ITEM_KEY ELSE -998 END)  PRODUCT_KEY,
SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY			RU_AR_TRX_KEY ,                
CASE WHEN SMATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =-9999 THEN 'LINE LEVEL'  ELSE 'TRX LEVEL' END FREIGHT_LINE_TYPE,           
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN 'DEBIT' ELSE NULL END FREIGHT_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE,
EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID	SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT , 
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE		SS_CODE   ,                    
EORCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE                      
FROM	$$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_FRT EORCTL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL
	ON (SMATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON (SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
	ON ( NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL_1
	ON (SMATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL_1.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = EORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID	   
    AND       EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')                                             
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    /* added for Q4FY18 CDC */
   ON (  EORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
   and   EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')            
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
       ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
       AND            EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SMAT
	ON (SMAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
	AND SMAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
WHERE EORCTL.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'

SELECT
SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,             
SGRCTL.DESCRIPTION		FREIGHT_LINE_DESCRIPTION    ,  
SGRCTL.UOM_CODE			UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE     ,     
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN SGRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END	RU_FREIGHT_DEBIT_AMOUNT ,      
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SGRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END		RU_FREIGHT_CREDIT_AMOUNT,      
SMATL_1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY		BK_ITEM_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,     
(CASE WHEN SGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' THEN COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) WHEN SGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN COALESCE(NP2.ITEM_KEY,-998) ELSE -998 END) PRODUCT_KEY, /* cdc change */
SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY			RU_AR_TRX_KEY ,                
CASE WHEN SGRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID  =-9999 THEN 'LINE LEVEL'  ELSE 'TRX LEVEL' END FREIGHT_LINE_TYPE,           
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN 'DEBIT' ELSE NULL END FREIGHT_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE,
SGRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID	SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT , 
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE		SS_CODE   ,                    
SGRCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE                      
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SGRCTL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL
	ON (SMATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SGRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON (SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
	ON ( NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL_1
	ON (SMATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SGRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL_1.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = SGRCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID 
	       AND       SGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
                                                  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    /* added for Q4FY18 CDC */
   ON (  SGRCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
   and   SGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
       ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
       AND            SGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 

	
	
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SMAT
	ON (SMAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SGRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
	AND SMAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
WHERE
/* rchettri : LSS-AR Q3Fy14 change: DUTY and FREIGHT will come with LINE_TYPE ='LINE'. Need to segregate based on SKU
 SGRCTL.LINE_TYPE='FREIGHT' */
/*(CASE   WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = 'FREIGHT' then 'FREIGHT'
        ELSE SGRCTL.LINE_TYPE
END) = 'FREIGHT'*/
SGRCTL.LINE_TYPE='FREIGHT' OR (SGRCTL.LINE_TYPE='LINE' AND COALESCE(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'UNKNOWN') = 'FREIGHT')
OR (SGRCTL.LINE_TYPE='LINE' AND COALESCE(NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'UNKNOWN') = 'FREIGHT')

UNION ALL
SELECT
SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,             
EGRCTL.DESCRIPTION		FREIGHT_LINE_DESCRIPTION    ,  
EGRCTL.UOM_CODE			UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE     ,     
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EGRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END	RU_FREIGHT_DEBIT_AMOUNT ,      
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EGRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END		RU_FREIGHT_CREDIT_AMOUNT,      
SMATL_1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY		BK_ITEM_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,  
(CASE WHEN EGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' THEN COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) WHEN EGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN COALESCE(NP2.ITEM_KEY,-998) ELSE -998 END) PRODUCT_KEY,   

SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY			RU_AR_TRX_KEY ,                
CASE WHEN SMATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =-9999 THEN 'LINE LEVEL'  ELSE 'TRX LEVEL' END FREIGHT_LINE_TYPE,           
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN 'DEBIT' ELSE NULL END FREIGHT_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE,
EGRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID	SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT , 
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE		SS_CODE   ,                    
EGRCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE                      
FROM	$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_FRT EGRCTL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL
	ON (SMATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EGRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON (SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
	ON ( NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL_1
	ON (SMATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EGRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL_1.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = EGRCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
		       AND       EGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
                                                  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    /* added for Q4FY18 CDC */
   ON (  EGRCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
   and   EGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
       ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
       AND            EGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 

	
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SMAT
	ON (SMAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = EGRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
	AND SMAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
WHERE EGRCTL.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
AND EGRCTL.LINE_TYPE='FREIGHT' OR (EGRCTL.LINE_TYPE='LINE' AND COALESCE(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'UNKNOWN') = 'FREIGHT')
OR (EGRCTL.LINE_TYPE='LINE' AND COALESCE(NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'UNKNOWN') = 'FREIGHT')

SELECT BATCH_ID,
 CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 CREATION_DATE,
 CREATED_BY,

 UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
 SALES_ORDER,
 SALES_ORDER_REVISION,
 SALES_ORDER_LINE,
 SALES_ORDER_DATE,

 WAREHOUSE_ID,

 BR_REF_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,

 PAYMENT_SET_ID, 
 CONTRACT_LINE_ID, 
 SOURCE_DATA_KEY1, 
 SOURCE_DATA_KEY2,

 OVERRIDE_AUTO_ACCOUNTING_FLAG,

 FRT_ED_ACCTD_AMOUNT, 
 FRT_UNED_AMOUNT, 
 FRT_UNED_ACCTD_AMOUNT,
 DEFERRAL_EXCLUSION_FLAG,
 RULE_END_DATE, 
 PAYMENT_TRXN_EXTENSION_ID,
 INTEREST_LINE_ID, 
 GLOBAL_NAME, 
 CREATE_DATETIME,
 ACTION_CODE, 
EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
(SELECT SGRCTL.BATCH_ID,
 SGRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 SGRCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 SGRCTL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 SGRCTL.CREATION_DATE,

 SGRCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3,
 SGRCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4,
 SGRCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5,
 SGRCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6,
 SGRCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
 SGRCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8,
 SGRCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9,

 SGRCTL.BR_REF_PAYMENT_SCHEDULE_ID, 
 SGRCTL.BR_ADJUSTMENT_ID, 
 SGRCTL.MRC_EXTENDED_ACCTD_AMOUNT,
 SGRCTL.PAYMENT_SET_ID, 
 SGRCTL.CONTRACT_LINE_ID, 
 SGRCTL.SOURCE_DATA_KEY1, 
 SGRCTL.SOURCE_DATA_KEY2, 
 SGRCTL.SOURCE_DATA_KEY3, 
 SGRCTL.SOURCE_DATA_KEY4,
 SGRCTL.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5,
 SGRCTL.INVOICED_LINE_ACCTG_LEVEL,
 SGRCTL.OVERRIDE_AUTO_ACCOUNTING_FLAG,
 SGRCTL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID, 
 SGRCTL.SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_ID, 
 SGRCTL.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID, 
 SGRCTL.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID, 
 SGRCTL.HISTORICAL_FLAG,
 SGRCTL.TAX_LINE_ID, 
 SGRCTL.LINE_RECOVERABLE,
 SGRCTL.TAX_RECOVERABLE, 
 SGRCTL.TAX_CLASSIFICATION_CODE,
 SGRCTL.AMOUNT_DUE_REMAINING, 
 SGRCTL.ACCTD_AMOUNT_DUE_REMAINING,
 SGRCTL.AMOUNT_DUE_ORIGINAL, 
 SGRCTL.ACCTD_AMOUNT_DUE_ORIGINAL, 
 SGRCTL.CHRG_AMOUNT_REMAINING, 
 SGRCTL.CHRG_ACCTD_AMOUNT_REMAINING,
 SGRCTL.FRT_ADJ_REMAINING, 
 SGRCTL.FRT_ADJ_ACCTD_REMAINING, 
 SGRCTL.FRT_ED_AMOUNT, 
 SGRCTL.FRT_ED_ACCTD_AMOUNT, 
 SGRCTL.FRT_UNED_AMOUNT, 
 SGRCTL.FRT_UNED_ACCTD_AMOUNT,
 SGRCTL.DEFERRAL_EXCLUSION_FLAG,
 SGRCTL.RULE_END_DATE, 
 SGRCTL.PAYMENT_TRXN_EXTENSION_ID,
 SGRCTL.INTEREST_LINE_ID, 
 SGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME, 
 SGRCTL.CREATE_DATETIME,
 SGRCTL.ACTION_CODE, 
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SGRCTL
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON (SGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = SGRCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID 
       AND       SGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
                                                  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    /* added for Q4FY18 CDC */
   ON (  SGRCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
   and   SGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
       ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
       AND            SGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 

	
	
	
WHERE 
/* rchettri : LSS-AR Q3Fy14 change: DUTY and FREIGHT will come with LINE_TYPE ='LINE'. Need to segregate based on SKU
SGRCTL.LINE_TYPE ='FREIGHT' 
*/
/*(CASE   WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = 'FREIGHT' then 'FREIGHT'
        ELSE SGRCTL.LINE_TYPE
END)='FREIGHT' */
SGRCTL.LINE_TYPE ='FREIGHT'  OR (SGRCTL.LINE_TYPE ='LINE' AND COALESCE(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'UNKNOWN') = 'FREIGHT' )  OR (SGRCTL.LINE_TYPE ='LINE' AND COALESCE(NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'UNKNOWN') = 'FREIGHT' )
AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT '1' FROM  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL,  
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	WHERE SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SGRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
   WHERE SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SGRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND  SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL_1
   WHERE SATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SGRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND  SATL_1.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
	WHERE NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME = SGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME )
)
) X

ON (SGRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
WHERE 
SGRCTL.LINE_TYPE ='LINE'  
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP WHERE NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = SGRCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID )
) X
